steps.title: Identify the crucial fact
steps.content: The passage states that some expressions appear only in songs, while current preservation efforts focus on spoken language. This is the key information that drives the conclusion.

steps.title: Match to the solution
steps.content:
C addresses the core issue directly—incorporating songs into preservation efforts would capture all expressions.

The other options either propose unrelated analysis (A), describe songs without solving preservation (B), or make unsupported claims (D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
